mapper.sql: SELECT s.id, s.session_id, s.skill_id, s.difficulty, s.resume_id, s.total_questions, s.current_question_index, s.status, s.questions_json, s.overall_score, s.overall_feedback, s.strengths_json, s.improvements_json, s.reference_answers_json, s.created_at, s.completed_at, s.evaluate_status, s.evaluate_error, s.llm_provider, r.id AS r_id, r.file_hash AS r_file_hash, r.original_filename AS r_original_filename, r.file_size AS r_file_size, r.content_type AS r_content_type, r.storage_key AS r_storage_key, r.storage_url AS r_storage_url, r.resume_text AS r_resume_text, r.uploaded_at AS r_uploaded_at, r.last_accessed_at AS r_last_accessed_at, r.access_count AS r_access_count, r.analyze_status AS r_analyze_status, r.analyze_error AS r_analyze_error FROM interview_sessions s LEFT JOIN resumes r ON r.id = s.resume_id
mapper.select: WHERE s.resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO interview_sessions ( session_id, skill_id, difficulty, resume_id, total_questions, current_question_index, status, questions_json, overall_score, overall_feedback, strengths_json, improvements_json, reference_answers_json, created_at, completed_at, evaluate_status, evaluate_error, llm_provider ) VALUES ( #{entity.sessionId}, #{entity.skillId}, #{entity.difficulty},
#{entity.resume.id} #{entity.resumeId} , #{entity.totalQuestions}, #{entity.currentQuestionIndex}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.questionsJson}, #{entity.overallScore}, #{entity.overallFeedback}, #{entity.strengthsJson}, #{entity.improvementsJson}, #{entity.referenceAnswersJson}, COALESCE(#{entity.createdAt}, NOW()), #{entity.completedAt}, #{entity.evaluateStatus}, #{entity.evaluateError}, #{entity.llmProvider} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE interview_sessions SET session_id = #{entity.sessionId}, skill_id = #{entity.skillId}, difficulty = #{entity.difficulty}, resume_id =
#{entity.resume.id} #{entity.resumeId} , total_questions = #{entity.totalQuestions}, current_question_index = #{entity.currentQuestionIndex}, status = #{entity.status}, questions_json = #{entity.questionsJson}, overall_score = #{entity.overallScore}, overall_feedback = #{entity.overallFeedback}, strengths_json = #{entity.strengthsJson}, improvements_json = #{entity.improvementsJson}, reference_answers_json = #{entity.referenceAnswersJson}, created_at = #{entity.createdAt}, completed_at = #{entity.completedAt}, evaluate_status = #{entity.evaluateStatus}, evaluate_error = #{entity.evaluateError}, llm_provider = #{entity.llmProvider} WHERE id = #{entity.id}
